segments.text: No, it doesn't have enough offstage resources to be able to hover out there, because Iolink can just stall all they want.
Absolutely, yeah. Still two stocks on Iolink.

full_text: No, it doesn't have enough offstage resources to be able to hover out there, because Iolink can just stall all they want. Absolutely, yeah. Still two stocks on Iolink.
